name: kilnflow-ops
description: KilnFlow Ops — community ceramic studio kiln operations

scripts.build: npm --workspace @kilnflow/shared run build && npm --workspace @kilnflow/backend run build && npm --workspace @kilnflow/frontend run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @kilnflow/shared run typecheck && npm --workspace @kilnflow/backend run typecheck && npm --workspace @kilnflow/frontend run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --workspace @kilnflow/backend run test && npm --workspace @kilnflow/frontend run test
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
